# Napa's Flooring

> Tampa Bay's craft-first flooring crew — hardwood, vinyl, tile, laminate and stair treads installed by hand. Licensed & insured flooring contractor based in Bradenton, Florida,
> serving the Tampa Bay – Sarasota corridor since 2020.

## Key Facts

- Business name: Napa's Flooring (Napa's Flooring LLC)
- Phone: (407) 627-9533
- Email: napasflooring@gmail.com
- Address: 5926 SR 70 E, Suite 200, Bradenton, FL 34212
- Founded: 2020
- Google rating: 5.0 stars (15 reviews)
- Track record: 300+ Tampa Bay floors finished since 2020
- Warranty: 12-month workmanship warranty on every installation.
- Response time: Free estimate within 24 hours, often same-day.
- Quality standard: Napa's 47-Point Installation Standard (47 verification points on every job)
- Service area: Bradenton, Lakewood Ranch, Palmetto, Parrish, Sarasota, St. Petersburg, Tampa, and Venice, Florida

## Services

- [Hardwood Flooring](https://napasflooring.com/hardwood-flooring/): Solid plank, engineered plank, and wide-board European white oak — installed by hand, acclimated for the Gulf Coast, and finished to outlast the next twenty years of Tampa Bay living.
- [Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) Flooring](https://napasflooring.com/vinyl-plank-flooring/): 100% waterproof, scratch-resistant, dimensionally stable in Florida humidity, and the smartest dollar-per-square-foot floor you can install in a Tampa Bay rental, kitchen, or family room.
- [Tile Installation](https://napasflooring.com/tile-installation/): Porcelain, ceramic, natural stone, and large-format slabs — set flat, set straight, and set to the slope your shower pan actually needs.
- [Laminate Flooring](https://napasflooring.com/laminate-flooring/): Modern AC4 and AC5 laminate — installed with a proper expansion gap, the right underlayment for your slab, and the moisture-barrier work that keeps the floor flat in year five.
- [Stair Treads](https://napasflooring.com/stair-treads/): Solid hardwood, engineered, LVP, and laminate stair treads — custom-cut, riser-matched, and finished to match the floor you're tying them into.
- [Floor Repair](https://napasflooring.com/floor-repair/): Plank replacement, board lacing, sand-and-refinish, water-damage rebuilds, and the slab-prep work that nobody else wants to touch.

## Service Areas

- [Bradenton, FL](https://napasflooring.com/bradenton/): Bradenton — Manatee County seat. 60,000 residents inside city limits, 420,000 in the metro. Heavy mix of gated golf communities east of I-75 and renovation-ready mid-century homes west of US-41.
- [Lakewood Ranch, FL](https://napasflooring.com/lakewood-ranch/): Lakewood Ranch — 30,000-acre planned community across two counties, more than 30 villages, ranked #1 best-selling master-planned community in the US for eight consecutive years.
- [Palmetto, FL](https://napasflooring.com/palmetto/): Palmetto — historic riverfront city across the Manatee River from Bradenton. 13,500 residents. Mix of 1950s–70s waterfront homes (many snowbird-owned) and new master-planned developments along US-301.
- [Parrish, FL](https://napasflooring.com/parrish/): Parrish — fastest-growing community in Manatee County. Population doubled since 2015 to 28,000+. New-construction master-planned communities (North River Ranch, Aviary, Canoe Creek) drive the market.
- [Sarasota, FL](https://napasflooring.com/sarasota/): Sarasota — Suncoast cultural anchor. 58,000 in city, 450,000 metro. High median income. Bifurcated market: waterfront condos/key homes drive premium installs; west-of-Trail ranches drive renovation work.
- [St. Petersburg, FL](https://napasflooring.com/st-petersburg/): St. Petersburg — Pinellas County. 260,000 in city, 1M+ in county. Older, denser, more architecturally varied than the Manatee/Sarasota footprint. Heavy subfloor remediation work on pre-1970 housing stock.
- [Tampa, FL](https://napasflooring.com/tampa/): Tampa — largest market in our footprint. 400,000 in city, 1.5M+ county. Strongest job growth of any major FL metro. South Tampa drives premium installs; north Tampa drives volume new-construction upgrades.
- [Venice, FL](https://napasflooring.com/venice/): Venice — Sarasota County. 26,000 residents. Bifurcated market: Venice Island & Historic Downtown (1950s–60s renovations) + Wellen Park / West Villages (15,000+ new-construction homes since 2018).

## Buyer's Guides

- [What Flooring Actually Holds Up to Gulf Coast Humidity (2026 Guide)](https://napasflooring.com/blog/best-flooring-gulf-coast-humidity/): Florida-tested flooring picks for Tampa Bay and Sarasota homes — engineered hardwood, SPC, porcelain. Real humidity data, real install requirements, real costs.
- [Short-Term Rental Flooring: What Works in Tampa Bay (Owner's Playbook)](https://napasflooring.com/blog/short-term-rental-flooring-tampa-bay/): STR-tested flooring picks for Anna Maria, Siesta, Lido, and Wellen Park rentals. Durability data, turnover costs, and the floors that pay for themselves.
- [Refinishing Old Oak Floors in Tampa Bay (the 2026 Reality Check)](https://napasflooring.com/blog/refinishing-old-oak-floors-tampa-bay/): Honest cost and process guide to sanding and refinishing pre-war and mid-century oak floors in Bradenton, Sarasota, Tampa, and St. Pete.
- [Stair Tread Replacement, Explained: Carpet to Wood in 2 Days](https://napasflooring.com/blog/stair-tread-replacement-explained/): Step-by-step guide to replacing carpeted stair treads with hardwood, LVP, or laminate. Real costs, real timeline, what goes wrong, and how Napa's avoids it.
- [Engineered Hardwood vs. SPC Vinyl Plank: A Lakewood Ranch Field Test](https://napasflooring.com/blog/engineered-hardwood-vs-spc-lakewood-ranch/): Side-by-side comparison of premium engineered hardwood and 22-mil SPC vinyl plank — durability, cost, install, resale impact in Lakewood Ranch homes.
